title: ANC - changes are present after restarting the app
scenario: ANC setting does not persist after killing and restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to the Poly Bluetooth audio device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → ANC.
3. Set ANC to a specific value (e.g., High, Low, or Adaptive).
4. Force close (kill) the Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Re-launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and reconnect to the device.
6. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → ANC.
expected: The ANC setting should persist and display the same value as set in step 3.
